title: suppress useless width warning on string parameter comparisons

features.name: string_parameter_declaration
features.description: Code should include a string parameter declaration with a string literal value

features.name: string_parameter_comparison_different_lengths
features.description: Code should include a string parameter comparison using equality operator between strings of different literal lengths
features.snippet:
parameter string intended_device_family = "aaa";
parameter family_base_stratixii = (intended_device_family == "aaa II");
